problem: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Monte. Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
